infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mingla needs location access to find experiences near you and provide location-based recommendations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Mingla needs location access to find experiences near you and provide location-based recommendations.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mingla needs camera access to capture photos for your experiences.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mingla needs photo library access to select images for your experiences.
